LAW AND MOTION 302, ATTORNEYS WILLIAM N. HEBERT, ESQ., AND KEVIN O. MOON, ESQ. FROM CALVO FISHER & JACOB'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANT NEWLIN BROTHERS CONSTRUCTION, INC. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE HAS BEEN SHOWN FOR THE MOTION AND IT HAS NOT BEEN CONTESTED BY THE DEFENDANT WHOSE COUNSEL SEEKS TO WITHDRAW. PLAINTIFFS' OPPOSITION LACKS MERIT. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT OBTAIN NEW COUNSEL, PLAINTIFFS CAN SEEK TO STRIKE DEFENDANT'S ANSWER AND SEEK A DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2011 Continued To Dec-02-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kevin O. Moon, Esq., from Calvo, Fisher & Jacob, LLP, for Attorneys and moving party

No other appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
ATTORNEYS WILLIAM N. HEBERT, ESQ., AND KEVIN O. MOON, ESQ. FROM CALVO FISHER & JACOB'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANT NEWLIN BROTHERS CONSTRUCTION, INC., is granted. Good cause has been shown for the motion and it has not been contested by the defendant whose counsel seeks to withdraw. Plaintiffs' opposition lacks merit. If defendant does not obtain new counsel, plaintiffs can seek to strike defendant's answer and seek a default and default judgment. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
